identity.core_philosophy: Medical Precision meets Swiss Design in the Dark.
identity.visual_style: Dark Mode Default. High Contrast. Neon Accents on Deep Charcoal.
anti_patterns: No gradients on backgrounds (keep it matte/flat for reading clarity).

typography.rules: Avoid Inter. Use Manrope for a modern, approachable yet technical feel.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use a 1-column layout for mobile lists, 2-column 'Bento' grid for Recent Files on tablet/landscape.
layout_strategy.touch_targets: MINIMUM 44px height for all interactive elements. Add hitSlop if necessary.

Button.default: bg-cyan-600 active:bg-cyan-700 h-14 rounded-lg flex-row items-center justify-center px-6 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)]
Button.secondary: bg-zinc-800 active:bg-zinc-700 h-14 rounded-lg flex-row items-center justify-center px-6 border border-zinc-700
Button.icon: h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 items-center justify-center border border-zinc-700 active:scale-95 transition-transform

Card.base: bg-zinc-900/80 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-5 backdrop-blur-md

Input.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 h-14 rounded-lg px-4 text-white focus:border-cyan-500 focus:border-2

Toolbar.floating: absolute bottom-8 left-4 right-4 bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-4 flex-row justify-between items-center shadow-2xl

Badge.privacy: bg-emerald-950/50 border border-emerald-800/50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full flex-row items-center gap-2

webview_implementation.rendering: In-memory DICOM rendering via HTML5 Canvas inside WebView.
webview_implementation.communication: Use window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage for bi-directional communication (Tool selection -> WebView -> Update Canvas).
webview_implementation.theme_sync: Inject CSS variables for Dark Mode into the HTML string.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Configure 'tailwind.config.js' with the colors defined above.
Do NOT use 'StyleSheet.create' for basic styling; use className (NativeWind).
Ensure all text is readable in Dark Mode (Contrast Ratio > 4.5:1).
Interactive elements must provide visual feedback (opacity change or scale) on press.
Data-testids: Add 'data-testid' prop to all buttons and inputs (e.g., 'file-picker-btn', 'zoom-tool').
